scripts.check:security: pnpm run check:console && pnpm run check:types && pnpm run check:storeid && pnpm run check:prehandler
scripts.check:console: grep -r 'console.log' apps/backend/src/ && echo 'Found console.log' || echo 'No console.log found'
scripts.check:storeid: grep -r 'body.storeId' apps/backend/src/ && echo 'Found body.storeId' || echo 'No body.storeId found'
scripts.check:prehandler: grep -r 'preHandler' apps/backend/src/routes/ && echo 'Found inline preHandler' || echo 'No inline preHandler found'
